common.tagline: Music connects. Proximity makes it real.

hero.title: Find people with the same musical DNA
hero.subtitle: Soundmatch connects you with like-minded people – based on your real music taste. Nearby and worldwide.

match.title: Match Score
match.desc: Algorithm calculates your musical compatibility with other users in percent.

radar.title: Music Radar
radar.desc: Live map shows you who's listening to what nearby – in real time.

radio.title: Local Radio
radio.desc: Share what you're listening to – metadata only, no audio. Song opens in your streaming service.

creator.title: Creator Stage
creator.desc: The first native platform for music curators. Build followers, grow your audience.

privacy.title: Privacy is not a luxury
privacy.desc: 4 privacy levels – all free. No pay-to-privacy. GDPR compliant.

splash.title: Soundmatch
splash.subtitle: Find people with the same musical DNA – nearby and worldwide.

hook.desc: That's the Soundmatch moment. Music as a bridge to people you haven't met yet.

connect.title: Connect Spotify
connect.desc: Metadata only – no audio, no licensing issues. You keep full control.

privacy.title: Your Visibility
privacy.desc: Change anytime. No pay-to-privacy – all levels free for everyone.

open.label: Open
open.desc: Song, profile & exact location visible to all

anonymous.label: Anonymous
anonymous.desc: No name, no photo · Location ~1km fuzzy

invisible.label: Invisible
invisible.desc: Completely invisible – you see others, no one sees you

radio.title: LOCAL CHANNELS
radio.startDesc: Share what you listen to – metadata only, no audio upload, no licensing

creators.title: CREATOR STAGE
creators.subtitle: Music Curators
creators.desc: The first native platform for music curators – build followers, grow your audience, show your curation history.
creators.becomeDesc: Build your audience. Share your music taste. Show your curation history.
